alkylation reagent: 10 µl of 200 mM iodoacetamide (60 min at RT in dark)
cleavage agent: 0.6 µg trypsin was added for digest at 37°C overnight
collision energy: analyzed after CID fragmentation at 35% normalized collision energy
instrument: Samples were analyzed on a LC-MS/MS platform consisting of Orbitrap Fusion Lumos
labeling: using default parameters and Label Free Quantitation
reduction reagent: first 5 µl of 200 mM dithiothreitol (30 min at 24°C)
